findings.issue: NOT FIXED from round 1. TDD Anchor entries still lack the full file-path prefix on each line. The file path is stated once as prose ('Файл: `app/src/test/...ChatTopAppBarStateTest.kt`') and then individual entries list only the test name and description without the `path::test_name` format required by the template.
findings.fix: Prefix each entry with the full path and `::`: `` `app/src/test/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/ui/chat/ChatTopAppBarStateTest.kt::topAppBarState_draft_returnsDownloadedModels` — при ChatIdentity.Draft и двух downloaded-моделях topAppBarState возвращает Draft с обеими моделями ``

findings.issue: NOT FIXED from round 1. ChatViewModel.kt is explicitly modified by this task (TopAppBarState sealed class, WarmupCoordinator injection, loadModel() method — described in Details → Files), but it appears only under 'Code files (read for context)' in Context Files, not as a file being modified. Tech-spec Task 10 'Files to modify' lists only ChatScreen.kt and HomeScreen.kt. The traceability gap remains: the task modifies three files but declares two.
findings.fix: Move ChatViewModel.kt from 'read for context' to a 'Code files (modify)' subsection in Context Files, or add a note in Details → Files that ChatViewModel.kt changes are supplemental to Task 8 and were not listed in tech-spec 'Files to modify'.

findings.issue: NOT FIXED from round 1. Same TDD Anchor format issue: test file path appears as prose at the top of the section ('Файл: `app/src/test/...ModelManagerViewModelTest.kt`') but individual entries list only test names and descriptions without the `path::test_name` prefix.

NOT FIXED from round 1. Under 'Primary audit targets (highest risk)', files are listed as plain text paths without markdown links: `- app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/data/DefaultChatRepository.kt — file-path construction`. Template requires markdown link format `[name](path)` for all files in Context Files.
findings.fix: Convert each plain-text path to a markdown link, e.g.: `- [DefaultChatRepository.kt](../../../app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/data/DefaultChatRepository.kt) — file-path construction`

findings.issue: Description says 'This audit task is Wave 7 (Audit Wave).' but frontmatter declares wave: 9. All audit tasks (13, 14, 15) are wave 9; the 'Wave 7' label is a stale reference from an earlier decomposition draft.
findings.fix: Change 'Wave 7 (Audit Wave)' to 'Audit Wave (wave 9)' or simply 'the Audit Wave' to match the frontmatter.

findings.issue: Details section is missing the required **Files**, **Edge cases**, and **Implementation hints** subsections defined by the template. The section contains substantive content (Audit scope, Test infrastructure context, Dependency note) but not in the standard labeled format.
findings.fix: For an audit task with no files to modify, 'Files' can note 'No files modified — output is a written report.' Add a brief 'Edge cases' subsection (e.g., test files not yet committed due to TDD violation, missing test file) and 'Implementation hints' (e.g., use TestCoroutineScheduler for timing-sensitive tests).

findings.issue: Details section is missing the required **Files**, **Edge cases**, and **Implementation hints** subsections. The section has good substantive content about dependencies and verification specifics but not in the standard labeled format.
findings.fix: Add labeled subsections: **Files:** (none modified — QA report written to decisions.md), **Edge cases:** (no connected device, aapt not on PATH, schema JSON missing from git), **Implementation hints:** (check aapt path, run connectedAndroidTest last as it requires device).
